p0.summary: Initiative packet created, decisions captured, corrected slice topology named, manifest targets P1.

p1a.summary: Dry-run package spine, shared 1Password reference value, deterministic manifest snapshot, Stack Installer web shell, and browser proof completed without live install behavior.

p1LiveHarness.summary: Live Manual Mode proof harness, driver packages, Tauri command, and app UI are implemented. macOS proof is complete, and full P1 remains blocked on the real Windows proof artifact.

p1PrReadinessReview.summary: Post-proof quality-review-fix-loop completed across the implemented P1 initiative surface and code paths. P1C may start under the temporary Windows missing-proof waiver, and full P1 remains blocked only on real Windows proof.

p1CompletionAudit.summary: Prompt-to-artifact completion audit records macOS proof complete, Windows proof temporarily waived for P1C start only, and full P1 still blocked on the real Windows artifact.

p1dAppFirstManualInstallerUx.summary: Active next milestone after P1C: make the Tauri app the primary surface and complete one real Linux-first Bun repair action for an existing Bun install through installer-owned code and installer-owned config.

p1PauseHandoff.summary: End-of-day pause handoff records the local Windows VM cleanup, stopped proof window, missing fresh proof artifacts, and resume checklist.

remainingGates: P1 Discord vertical, Manual Mode fresh-OS Windows proof
P1 Discord vertical, Manual Mode fresh-OS Windows proof
P2 AI Mode parity across Claude and Codex

p1LiveImplemented: app-local P1 Manual Mode proof harness
operator artifact capture wrapper for proof JSON, command transcript, and SHA-256 sums
local proof artifact audit for required files, checksum freshness, all validation events, configured providers, 1Password references, and Discord message evidence
live proof form with 1Password-reference-only token input

owns: testable adapters consumed by installer slice servers

phases.name: Initiative Bootstrap
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Packet created, decisions captured, corrected slice topology named, manifest targets P1.

phases.name: Discord Vertical, Manual Mode
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: P1A dry-run spine and P1 live harness are implemented; macOS proof is complete; full P1 still needs the real Windows manual run plus the post-proof PR readiness review/fix loop.

phases.name: App-First Manual Installer UX
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: The Tauri app becomes the primary operator surface and completes one real Linux-first Bun repair action for an existing Bun install through installer-owned code and installer-owned config.

phases.name: AI Mode Parity
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Claude and Codex AI Mode runs share one manifest and pass byte-identical-manifest gate modulo timestamps.

phases.name: Recovery
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: AI Mode repairs wrong Node version, invalid Discord token, and missing 1Password reference.

phases.name: Portability
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Manifest export/import works across macOS to Windows-WSL with validators green on the target.

phases.name: Distribution Readiness
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Signed macOS and Windows binaries, updates, opt-in telemetry, crash reporting, feedback, and CI builds are proven.

knownGaps: fresh-OS macOS and Windows proof not run
local Windows libvirt VM was intentionally cleaned up after the 2026-05-14 pause; recreate an 80 GiB VM or use another real Windows environment before resuming Windows proof

artifact intake via Taildrop is blocked until the coordinator runs sudo tailscale set --operator=$USER or uses another approved private transfer channel; tokenized temporary tailnet upload is documented as a fallback, but no proof bundles have arrived
coordinator-side Taildrop send to the online Windows peer is blocked because Tailscale reports the peer is owned by a different user
live upload endpoint is reachable through raw tailnet IP and MagicDNS, but upload logs show no PUT or POST artifact upload attempts
post-proof quality-review-fix-loop completed under temporary Windows missing-proof waiver (P1C closed)
live proof harness validates existing state only and does not install or provision dependencies
MCP executor adapter not built beyond minimal app-local Tauri bridge
skill and instruction bundle generation not built
AI Mode Claude provider adapter not built
AI Mode Codex provider adapter not built
distribution and signing pipeline not built
keyDecisions: P0 creates documentation and manifest only
future app package is @beep/stack-installer under apps/stack-installer
installer category packages were retired before v1 in favor of one installer slice with domain/use-cases/server roles
verb registry contracts are installer-owned and consumed by app/tooling
MCP executor is app-local runtime adapter code under apps/stack-installer
credential parameters are typed 1Password references only
Discord is the only v1 channel
macOS and Windows are v1 parity targets
P1 live drivers live under packages/drivers and are consumed by @beep/installer-server
P1 live proof workflow is installer-owned; app runtime composition remains app-local
nextAction: Keep P1 explicitly open on the missing Windows proof while making P1D the active execution lane. Resume the dedicated P1D branch/worktree from this packet truth, record the successful Linux-first repair-only Bun proof with installer-owned config and visible app-state evidence, then close and publish P1D. After P1D closes, run the real Windows proof intake/audit before starting P2.

completionGate.statement: Not achieved until this goal's work ships as a PR driven to mergeable via /yeet (bun run beep yeet: repair -> verify -> publish --pr -> monitor).
